title: bidens glandulifera
intro: Bidens glandulifera, also known as sticky beggar-ticks, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The medicinal properties of Bidens glandulifera are said to provide relief from various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, and it may also help to reduce inflammation and alleviate menstrual cramps. Bidens glandulifera is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its health benefits.
